Welcome back to the legacy coaching course. All right, now we are jumping into reporting your KPIs. Okay, KPIs are key performance indicators. They are what the coaches will be looking at each week to best help you. All right, so they will be collected weekly. Just fill out the Google form that we're gonna text you. So every week you'll get a text from the coaching coordinators or from your coach asking you to fill out the Google form and it has, I think just 10 questions on it and it's all KPI related. And it is, and you'll get another one at the end of the month as well, reporting your monthly stats from the previous month. So we'll take a look at all of these things. They'll get imported into our dashboards and we can help develop plans for you and see where you need to make adjustments to maximize your profit. So here's what they are, here's what they look like. We're gonna be asking you about your active clients, your ad spend, the new members that you gained for the month, cancellations that you had, challengers that you signed up for the month, the total revenue that you made from your services and then supplement commission. So those are the things that we are gonna be looking for and by giving us those numbers, we're gonna really be able to help develop some pretty cool plans for you and take a look from a data standpoint of what moves you need to make next. So by filling these forms out, your coaches will be able to quickly analyze your business and help dissect your problems. So they've been through training that show them how to quickly look for red flags and how to quickly dissect certain numbers. And if you're able to be super accurate each week with the KPIs that you're reporting, they'll be able to help you so much better. So they're also gonna be able to input the data into our backend software that will allow us to tell you exact numbers you'll need to hit to reach your goals. So like as an example, if you're like, hey, I want to acquire 60 clients per month. Well, based on that and based on your current numbers that you're giving us for how many challengers you convert over to EFT, what your normal cost per lead is, things like that, we're able to create some really cool comparisons and analysis and goal setting for you. We can say like, look, we can absolutely hit 60, but we need to be able to do X, Y and Z, right? And so we have all this stuff preloaded, but it all comes down to just getting your numbers. If we don't have your numbers, that's really hard to just kind of do guesswork. So that's why it's super important. We're asking for them on a weekly basis and then we'll do a month end recap. So what happened the previous month? What was your final month's numbers? Okay, so the key will be to take 10 minutes each week and report the stats as accurately as possible. Nobody will see the numbers besides your coach, okay? It's what can truly help your business. Don't give us any bullshit numbers or anything like that. That's not gonna help your business. This is what's really gonna help it is the raw numbers, the math, the data. So even the act of consistently knowing your numbers will make you more conscious about improving them. Just always knowing what they are. If you're reporting them every week, it's in your head. You know what your numbers are every single week. That's going to just subconsciously make you improve them. So hopefully that is something that's not too hard to do and we can take those numbers and we can absolutely help you guys crush it.
